steps.title: Find the antecedent
steps.content: The blank is the subject of will begin to combust. It refers back to the substance, cottonseed oil, which is singular and nonhuman, so the sentence needs a singular nonhuman pronoun.

steps.title: Reject pronoun errors
steps.content: A and C are plural, so they do not agree with cottonseed oil. B is not the standalone personal pronoun needed as the subject of this clause. The remaining pronoun agrees with the singular nonhuman antecedent. The answer is D.
